query:
-- serviceTypes: adicionar colunas faltantes
ALTER TABLE `serviceTypes`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `isPublic` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `publicationStatus` enum('draft','published','inactive','restricted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `purpose` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `whoCanRequest` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cost` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `formOfService` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `responseChannel` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `importantNotes` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `faq` json,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `formTemplateId` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `serviceMode` enum('form','external') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'form',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `externalUrl` varchar(2048);

-- tickets: adicionar coluna nup
ALTER TABLE `tickets`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nup` varchar(32);

-- messages.type: adicionar valores faltantes ao enum
ALTER TABLE `messages`
  MODIFY COLUMN `type` enum('text','image','audio','video','document','location','sticker','template','interactive','reaction') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'text';

-- tickets.status: adicionar valor 'pending' ao enum
ALTER TABLE `tickets`
  MODIFY COLUMN `status` enum('open','in_progress','pending','resolved','closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open';
